data.title: Publift Expands Leadership for Growth: Clara De Rosa Joins as Director of Client Services, David Bickell Leads New Department
data.description: Publift has recently made key changes to its leadership team, with Clara De Rosa being appointed as the new Director of Client Services based in London. In this role, De Rosa will be responsible for overseeing the Customer Success organization globally within Publift. This move is part of the company's strategy to enhance its services and provide better support to its clients. The announcement was made on April 23, 2026, marking a significant development for Publift as it continues to strengthen its leadership team.

data.title: American Diabetes Association Selects RKD Group as Direct Mail Agency
data.description: The ADA has recently chosen RKD Group as its primary direct mail agency, in a move aimed at enhancing donor interaction and introducing new fundraising strategies. This partnership, initiated in April 2026, is set to pave the way for a more strategic approach towards engaging with donors and implementing creative fundraising methods. The selection of RKD Group signifies a pivotal step for the ADA in achieving its philanthropic goals and underscores its commitment to fostering meaningful connections with supporters. The collaboration is anticipated to bring about a positive impact on the ADA's fundraising efforts, with both organizations working together to explore innovative solutions.

data.title: JiMMYBAR! Brings America's First Creatine Protein Bar to 1,500+ Convenience Stores Nationwide Through EG America Partnership
data.description: A functional bar brand, created by a family, now offers a convenient and ready-to-eat product that contains 20 grams of protein and provides a full 5-gram daily serving of creatine. This product is now being sold at various locations including Cumberland Farms, Certified Oil, Fastrac, Kwik Shop, Loaf 'N Jug, Minit Mart, Quik Stop, Sprint Food Stores, Tom Thumb, and Turkey, among others.

data.title: Love at First Fight Celebrates 15 Years of Transforming Relationships
data.description: Bruce Muzik, the founder, is dedicated to assisting couples in rekindling their relationships. He has expanded his free online masterclass aimed at resolving relationship conflicts. This initiative coincides with World Lover's Day and marks the 15th anniversary of Love at First Fight. The platform has been instrumental in guiding numerous couples through conflicts and fostering healthier relationships.

data.title: All Abilities Bike Announces New Inclusive Learn-to-Ride Program and Camp
data.description: In Rapid City, South Dakota, on April 23, 2026, the Strider Education Foundation introduced two innovative educational programs aimed at teaching individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities how to ride a bike. The All Abilities Bike Inclusive Learn-to-Ride Program is designed to cater to a diverse range of learners. This initiative marks a significant step forward in expanding access to bike education for individuals with disabilities. The foundation's efforts are aligned with the goal of promoting inclusivity and creating equal opportunities for all.
RUSSIA TO RESTART FX OPERATIONS UNDER BUDGET RULE IN MAY: IFX

data.title: Aurachain Expands Fraud.Watch Credit Union Network Through Partnership with CU*SOUTH
data.description: Aurachain, an AI orchestration platform catering to regulated industries, has disclosed a strategic collaboration with CU*SOUTH, a prominent credit union service organization (CUSO). The partnership aims to broaden the scope of its Fraud.Watch network throughout North America. The announcement was made on April 23, 2026, in Nashville, Tennessee.

data.title: Block Blast! Ends Q1 2026 as the No. 1 Most Downloaded Mobile Game Worldwide
data.description: Block Blast! topped the charts globally in January, February, and March 2026 for most downloads, as per Sensor Tower's data.

data.title: BlackRock boosts 7-day Bitcoin ETF inflow streak with $1.9B in assets as BTC approaches $80K.
data.description: During a seven-day period, US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced a streak of inflows amounting to $1.9 billion. This surpasses the inflows seen in March over the same timeframe.

data.title: Dan Finlay, co-founder of MetaMask, departs ConsenSys after a decade, due to burnout. Preston Pysh also steps back.
data.description: Dan Finlay, one of the co-founders of MetaMask, the popular cryptocurrency wallet, has decided to step down from his role at ConsenSys due to burnout. This comes amidst a trend of prominent figures in the crypto space, including well-known Bitcoin advocate Preston Pysh, reducing their public visibility. This shift in leadership within the industry has raised questions about the potential impact on these companies and the broader crypto community.

data.title: Spinogenix Announces CLARITY: a Phase 2b/3 trial of SPG601 for the Treatment of Fragile X Syndrome
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Los Angeles, Spinogenix, Inc., a company focused on developing innovative treatments to enhance the quality of life for patients, announced the launch of the CLARITY trial. The trial, a Phase 2b/3 adaptive study, will assess the effectiveness of SPG601 in males. SPG601 is designed to restore synapses and potentially offer significant benefits to patients. This trial marks a significant step in Spinogenix's clinical development program and represents a crucial stage in evaluating the therapeutic potential of SPG601. The company aims to address the needs of patients by bringing promising treatments to market.

data.title: Terra Rossa Announces New CEO and Management Changes
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 23, 2026, Terra Rossa Gold Ltd. (TSXV:TRR) (OTCQB:TRGXF) disclosed the naming of Carter Smith as President and CEO, with immediate effect. Carter also joins the Board of Directors of the Company.

data.title: VIRGINIA NATIONAL BANKSHARES CORPORATION ANNOUNCES 2026 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS AND QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
data.description: In Charlottesville, Virginia, on April 23, 2026, Virginia National Bankshares Corporation (NASDAQ: VABK) announced their quarterly earnings. The company reported a net income of $5.3 million for the first quarter of 2026, resulting in earnings of $0.97 per diluted share. This marks an improvement from the previous quarter's earnings of $4.5 million, equivalent to $0.83 per share.

data.title: Barnes & Noble Education to Host Investor Day on June 25, 2026
data.description: An upcoming event will focus on showcasing the company's strategy, key growth drivers, and financial outlook. This event aims to provide valuable insights into the company's direction and performance to stakeholders. Key numbers and projections will be shared, offering a comprehensive overview of the organization's plans for future success.

data.title: Greenland Mines Engages GTK Mintec for Comprehensive Metallurgical and Processing Flow Program at Skaergaard
data.description: Greenland Mines Ltd, listed on Nasdaq as GRML, has initiated a comprehensive processing and pilot testing program at Skaergaard to maximize the value of multiple metals. The company has partnered with GTK under a framework agreement to facilitate this initiative. The program aims to enhance operations and explore the potential for growth and efficiency. This development was announced on April 23, 2026, in Charlotte, North Carolina.

data.title: Vericel to Report First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Vericel Corporation, a prominent player in advanced therapies for sports medicine and severe burn care markets, is set to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026. The company (NASDAQ:VCEL) disclosed that a conference call and webcast will be conducted by its management at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to review the financial outcomes and key business achievements.

data.title: ICU Medical Announces Time of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: ICU Medical, Inc., a renowned company known for its innovative medical products, has revealed the details for its first quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call. The announcement was made on April 23, 2026, in San Clemente, California. ICU Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: ICUI), a leading player in the industry, will be sharing its financial results and insights during this event. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating this crucial update from the company.
New surgical robotics showcased at SMRSC 2026 by SS Innovations, set to revolutionize healthcare industry.

data.title: RenovoRx Announces Pharmacokinetic and Pharmacodynamic Data Abstract Supporting the TAMP™ Therapy Platform Accepted for Presentation at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: An abstract submission has been accepted as a sub-study within RenovoRx’s Phase III TIGeR-PaC clinical trial. This abstract delves into the TAMP™ therapy platform's ability to enhance local drug potency while decreasing systemic exposure and the typical side effects associated with chemotherapy. This development is a significant component of RenovoRx's ongoing research, with potential implications for increasing treatment efficacy and reducing adverse effects for patients.
Reborn Coffee releases 2025 corporate update with financial figures.
